languages.text: Механизмы движутся без натуги, несмотря на пылающий вокруг прометий. От них будто веет холодом — и чем-то нечеловеческим.

traits.locale_text: Механизмы движутся без натуги, несмотря на пылающий вокруг прометий. От них будто веет холодом — и чем-то нечеловеческим.

languages.text: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.
languages.original_text: Механизмы движутся без натуги, несмотря на пылающий вокруг прометий. От них будто веет холодом — и чем-то нечеловеческим.

traits.locale_text: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.
The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.

The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.
The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.

languages.text: 尽管周围满是燃烧的钷素，这些机械仍运转自如。它们似乎散发着寒意，以及某种别的东西——某种非人的气息。
languages.original_text: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.

traits.locale_text: 尽管周围满是燃烧的钷素，这些机械仍运转自如。它们似乎散发着寒意，以及某种别的东西——某种非人的气息。

languages.text: Las máquinas se mueven libremente, a pesar del prometio que arde a su alrededor. Parecen emanar frío, junto con otra cosa... algo inhumano.
languages.original_text: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.

traits.locale_text: Las máquinas se mueven libremente, a pesar del prometio que arde a su alrededor. Parecen emanar frío, junto con otra cosa... algo inhumano.

languages.text: En dépit du prométhium incandescent, les machines fonctionnent sans entraves. Une sensation de froid en émane, mais il y a autre chose... Quelque chose qui n'a rien d'humain.
languages.original_text: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.

traits.locale_text: En dépit du prométhium incandescent, les machines fonctionnent sans entraves. Une sensation de froid en émane, mais il y a autre chose... Quelque chose qui n'a rien d'humain.

languages.text: Etraftaki yanan prometyuma rağmen makineler serbestçe hareket ediyor. Onlardan soğukla birlikte başka bir şey daha yayılıyor gibi görünüyor... İnsanlık dışı bir şey.
languages.original_text: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.

traits.locale_text: Etraftaki yanan prometyuma rağmen makineler serbestçe hareket ediyor. Onlardan soğukla birlikte başka bir şey daha yayılıyor gibi görünüyor... İnsanlık dışı bir şey.

languages.text: Die Maschinen bewegen sich frei, obwohl sie von brennendem Promethium umgeben sind. Neben der Kälte steigt noch etwas von ihnen auf ... etwas Unmenschliches.
languages.original_text: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.

traits.locale_text: Die Maschinen bewegen sich frei, obwohl sie von brennendem Promethium umgeben sind. Neben der Kälte steigt noch etwas von ihnen auf ... etwas Unmenschliches.

languages.text: 機械は燃え盛るプルームテシウムの周りを自由に動き回る。機械からは冷たさと、何か異様なものが放たれている。
languages.original_text: The machines move freely, despite the burning promethium all around them. Cold seems to emanate from them, along with something else — something inhuman.

traits.locale_text: 機械は燃え盛るプルームテシウムの周りを自由に動き回る。機械からは冷たさと、何か異様なものが放たれている。
